name: Support service credit policy example
answer:
Customers can request a service credit within 14 days of a qualifying outage.
Customers can receive up to two months of subscription credit for a qualifying outage.
The office closes on Fridays.

sources.title: Support Service Credit Policy
sources.content:
Customers can request a service credit within 30 days of a qualifying outage.
Customers can receive up to one month of subscription credit for a qualifying outage.
Service credits are available only to customers on eligible plans.
